error.signature: RuntimeError: PointCloud2 field 'intensity' not found in message

verdict.summary: PointCloud2 message does not contain expected fields. LiDAR drivers produce different field names/types.

dead_ends.action: Cast the entire PointCloud2 to a fixed struct assuming field layout
dead_ends.why_fails: Different LiDAR models have different field layouts; hardcoded offsets cause data corruption

dead_ends.action: Ignore the missing field and use default values
dead_ends.why_fails: Downstream algorithms (SLAM, segmentation) produce wrong results with fabricated data

workarounds.action: Read available fields from the PointCloud2 message header
workarounds.how: for field in msg.fields: print(field.name, field.datatype, field.offset)
from sensor_msgs_py import point_cloud2; pts = point_cloud2.read_points(msg, field_names=['x','y','z'])

workarounds.action: Remap field names in the LiDAR driver launch configuration
